title: Consultation fee
content: Welcome to our Homoeopathic Clinic – an institute for holistic healing and personalized care. Homoeopathy will help you recover from your existing illness as well as prevent it in future. Free 10 min Introductory Call You can book a free 10 minutes introductory call with us where you can understand how Homoeopathy works and discuss your case and know the prognosis. Call Now Let’s start your healing process. Get in touch with Dr. Shweta Goyal. She is always excited to help you attain a healthy state of mind and body. If you are ready to start your healing journey, you can refer below. Recognizing the global nature of health and well-being, we extend our services to our International and NRI patients. We ensure that geographic boundaries do not hinder your access to top-notch homoeopathic care. Indian Patients ₹500-₹2500 / Initial Consultation \t Thorough examination \t Complete history-taking and case analysis \t Detailed prescription \t Expert advice on necessary investigations \t Personalized dietary guidance \t Acute care if required and \t Dedicated feedback call after two weeks to monitor your progress. title: Dr Shweta Goyal
content: DR. SHWETA GOYAL B.H.M.S (Gold Medalist) MD (Hom) PG (IACH) (Greece) D.N.H.E (Delhi) Dr. Shweta Goyal is a luminary in the field of homoeopathic medicine. With a distinguished educational background that includes a B.H.M.S degree, where she graduated as a Gold Medalist from Panjab University, an MD in Homeopathy, and a PG from the International Academy of Classical Homeopathy in Greece, Dr. Shweta Goyal embodies the epitome of excellence in her field. Education: A passionate homoeopath, Dr. Goyal is resolutely committed to the principles of homoeopathic medicine, which she believes have the potential to be the cornerstone of mainstream healthcare. Homoeopathic philosophy is rooted in the conviction that true healing is not just about alleviating symptoms but rather removing the root causes of diseases and eradicating ailments swiftly and effectively. Her unwavering commitment to the betterment of her patients is underscored by her additional qualification in the form of a D.N.H.E (Diploma in Nutrition and Health Education) from Delhi, enabling her to offer invaluable guidance on nutrition and stress management to her patients. She stands as a recipient of the prestigious Dr. Malati Allen Noble Award, bestowed upon her at the world's largest award ceremony in the field of homoeopathy held in Kolkata, India, a testament to her outstanding contributions to the discipline. In her quest for a deeper understanding of the intricate workings of homoeopathy, she embarked on a journey of continuous learning, culminating in her postgraduate studies in Levels of Health from the International Academy of Classical Homeopathy in Greece. This pursuit of knowledge has fortified her expertise in the treatment of chronic diseases. Not content with her impressive qualifications and awards, Dr. Shweta Goyal has also obtained an MD in Materia Medica, delving into the extensive literature of homoeopathic medicines, from Ludhiana, India. title: Online Consultation

We understand that health concerns know no borders, and our commitment to providing holistic care extends beyond geographical constraints. Patients can connect with Dr. Shweta Goyal from the comfort of their homes Seamless Access to Healing No matter where you are in the world, you can now experience the benefits of Homoeopathy with our online consultation services. Whether you reside in the hustle and bustle of the USA, the historic charm of England, the vast landscapes of Canada, the down under beauty of Australia, the cultural richness of Spain and Italy, the pristine shores of New Zealand, or the efficiency of Germany, Dr. Shweta’s Homoepathy is just a click away. Expert Homoeopathic Care, Anywhere Dr. Shweta Goyal expert advise is now accessible to patients around the globe. The convenience of online consultations eliminates the need for physical proximity, allowing individuals from different countries to benefit from our expertise. Distance should not be a barrier to receiving the personalized and effective care you deserve. We believe that everyone, regardless of their location, deserves the opportunity to explore the healing potential of Homoeopathy. Simple and Secure Engaging in an online consultation with Dr. Shweta’s Homoeopathy is a straightforward process. Through secure and user-friendly platforms, patients can connect with our practitioners, discuss their health concerns, and receive personalized Homoeopathic recommendations. title: Our Clinic
content: Nurturing Health, Spreading Hope: The Journey of Dr. Shweta Goyal's Homoeopathic Clinic   History: A Healing Revelation The story of Dr. Shweta Goyal's journey into the world of Homoeopathy is deeply rooted in a personal experience that forever changed her perception of healthcare. It all began when her brother faced a severe appendicitis attack, and conventional doctors recommended surgery as the only solution. Unwilling to accept surgery as the sole option, Dr. Shweta explored the potential of Homoeopathy. To her amazement, Homoeopathic medicine not only alleviated her brother's condition within 15 days but also prevented any recurrence to this day. This transformative experience ignited Dr. Shweta's passion for Homoeopathy and marked the start of her commitment to healing through natural and holistic means. Mission: From Personal Healing to Global Awareness Fueled by the success of her brother's recovery, Dr. Shweta embarked on a journey to spread Homoeopathy globally. However, she soon recognized the prevalent skepticism surrounding this alternative form of medicine. Undeterred, Dr. Shweta made it her mission, and consequently, the mission of her clinic, to raise awareness about Homoeopathy on a global scale. Every successful case reinforced her belief in the tremendous potential of Homoeopathy, but the challenge lay in convincing a skeptical audience. Despite the obstacles, she resolved to take on every case, no matter how complex, and provide solutions that not only cured but also enlightened individuals about the healing power of Homoeopathy. Looking towards the future, Dr. Shweta envisions establishing a Homoeopathic hospital where patients can be admitted and treated exclusively with Homoeopathic medicines. Her ultimate goal is to make Homoeopathy a household name, preventing individuals from resorting to harmful medications like antibiotics and steroids. title: Universal Healing Homoeopathy for All Ages and Genders
content: Universal Healing: Homoeopathy for All Ages and Genders Introduction: In healthcare system, finding an approach that caters to the diverse needs of all ages and genders is paramount. Homoeopathy emerges as a beacon of inclusivity, offering tailored wellness solutions that resonate with every individual, regardless of age or gender. Let's delve into how Homoeopathy transcends boundaries to provide holistic care for all. Universal Healing: Homoeopathy is not bound by age or gender; it is a universal healing modality that addresses the unique health concerns of each individual. From infants to the elderly, and irrespective of gender, Homoeopathy acknowledges the distinct nature of every patient, allowing for customized treatment plans that align with their specific needs. Gentle for All Ages: One of the remarkable attributes of Homoeopathy is its gentleness, making it suitable for individuals at every stage of life. Whether it's a colicky infant, a teenager navigating hormonal changes, or an elderly individual managing chronic conditions, Homoeopathy adapts seamlessly to provide effective and gentle healing. Balancing Hormones and Vitality: For women facing the complexities of hormonal changes or men navigating the challenges of aging, Homoeopathy offers tailored solutions. By addressing the root causes of hormonal imbalances, Homoeopathy not only alleviates symptoms but also promotes overall vitality, ensuring that both genders experience optimal well-being. Prenatal and Postnatal Care: Homoeopathy is a trusted ally for women during pregnancy and postpartum. Safely addressing common concerns such as morning sickness, fatigue, and postpartum recovery, it provides holistic support for the mother and the growing family. Its gentle nature makes it a reassuring choice for the delicate phases of life. Safe and Effective for Men's Health: Men, too, benefit from the healing touch of Homoeopathy. Whether managing stress, promoting prostate health, or addressing concerns relate

title: Why Choose Homoeopathy
content: Why Homoeopathy: Homoeopathy is a scientific medicine based upon a holistic approach because it treats the person as a whole. A holistic perspective means the patient is considered as a unique person who requires individual assessment, care and treatment. As stated by WHO, health is a state of physical, mental and social well-being and not merely the absence of disease or infirmity. Treatment in homoeopathy includes the physical, mental, emotional, spiritual and social aspects of the persons. Disease is considered as a result of an imbalance in the state of whole individual at the level of mind and body. Homoeopathy looks beyond the labels of disease to cure their causes rather than merely their symptoms. It stimulates body’s own natural healing powers to bring about health and well-being. It does not treat superficially but heals the patient from within. Patients after taking homoeopathic treatment report improvement in overall energy, mood, quality of sleep and digestion. Homoeopathy is a safe medicine. They are suitable for pregnant women, infants and children without worrying about the dosage. Homoeopathy helps to transform your health with permanent cure. \t Safe Medicine (Suitable for Children, Pregnant, Old) \t Permanent Cure \t Restores Health \t Boosts Immunity \t Can help prevent Surgeries \t Longevity \t No side-effects
